diagrams.title: Multiple Linear Regression Model Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between multiple input variables X₁, X₂, ..., Xₙ and output Y through coefficients β₀, β₁, ..., βₙ
elements: Input variables X₁, X₂, X₃,..., Xₙ
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how multiple predictors combine to predict the outcome

diagrams.title: Residual Analysis Plot Patterns
diagrams.description: Shows four common residual plot patterns: (a) Good model (random scatter), (b) Heteroscedasticity (funnel), (c) Non-linearity (curved), (d) Outliers

diagrams.title: Correlation Matrix Heatmap for Multicollinearity
diagrams.description: Visual representation of correlations between predictors showing potential multicollinearity issues

diagrams.title: Gradient Descent Optimization
diagrams.description: Shows the iterative process of finding optimal coefficients by descending the error surface
diagrams.purpose: Understanding numerical methods for estimating MLR coefficients
